title: B2B Lead Generation for IT Services
desc:
I’m looking for a skilled B2B lead generation or business development partner to help generate genuine business leads and scheduled meetings for VyasByte IT Solutions. We specialize in:

- Website Development & Redesign
- E-commerce Websites
- SaaS Solutions
- CRM/ERP
- AI Chatbot & Automation
- Admin Dashboards

Key Requirements:
1. Deliver verified, qualified leads or set appointments—not random contact lists or unverified data.
2. Payments will be milestone-based, tied to deliverables such as verified leads, scheduled meetings, outreach reports, or appointment-setting progress.
3. Must have prior experience in B2B lead generation, especially for IT services such as web development, ecommerce, SaaS, automation, CRM, and ERP solutions.
4. Clearly outline the outreach channels used (e.g., LinkedIn campaigns, email outreach, freelance platforms, social media strategies) and how they’ll achieve quality results.

Trial Phase and Budget:
Trial phase with milestone-based payment in the budget range of ₹8,000–₹15,000 for the first month based on proposed process and deliverables. Successful results may lead to a long-term monthly partnership.

Deliverables: 
- Verified business leads from India/USA/UK/Canada/Australia or similar markets needing IT solutions.
- Detailed outreach and progress reports.

title: One-on-One Application Security Mentoring
desc:
I’m ready to move my career into cybersecurity, specifically application security, and I’m looking for a mentor who can guide me step-by-step. My goal is to understand secure coding practices, common web and mobile vulnerabilities, and the tools we use to detect and remediate them—everything from static analysis scanners to OWASP testing methodologies.  

Because I learn best through conversation and immediate feedback, I’d like live, one-on-one sessions, ideally once or twice a week, with practical homework in between. I already have a solid general IT background, so you can dive straight into topics such as threat modeling, secure SDLC integration, and real-world vulnerability triage.  

Deliverables I’d like to see:  
• A personalized learning roadmap that maps out the first three months.  
• Live mentoring calls with screen-sharing or lab walkthroughs.  
• Hands-on exercises or mini-projects I can complete after each session, plus your review notes.  

If you’re experienced in application security and enjoy teaching, let’s discuss the schedule and start planning my first milestone.

title: Gen Alpha Skin Care Brand
desc:
I'm launching a skin care brand specifically tailored for young adults, focusing initially on moisturizers. I'm looking for experienced freelancers who can help bring this vision to life.

Key Requirements:
- Develop a unique selling proposition (USP) for the brand
- Formulate a range of innovative and appealing moisturizers
- Design engaging and youthful branding and packaging
- Create a comprehensive marketing strategy targeting young adults

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proven experience in the skincare industry
- Strong background in product formulation, branding, and marketing
- Understanding of young adult consumer behavior and trends
- Creative and innovative mindset

SCOPE OF WORK
**Stage 1 — Brand Strategy |
1. Competitor decoding: 6 Indian brands
2. Inspiration brand learning: 4 international brands
3. Consumer understanding study
4. 16 qualitative consumer interviews (informal recruitment)
5. Brand positioning
6. Creative concept + mood boards

**Stage 2 — Brand Identity |
7. Logo
8. Mnemonic
9. Colour system
10. Typography
11. Illustration style setup
12. Photography style setup
13. Brand story
14. Key messaging (teens, parents)
15. Tone of voice

**Stage 3 — Packaging |
16. Master visual language: 3 routes explored, 1 finalised
17. Master designs × 3 sub-brand lines
18. Form recommendation from vendor catalogs
19. Information hierarchy / label structure
20. FOP, SOP, BOP verbal communication
21. Print-ready artworks: primary + secondary packaging
22. Variant ad

title: Portable Ultrasonic Velocity Meter
desc:
I need help taking a lab-bench concept for measuring ultrasonic wave velocity and turning it into a rugged, handheld instrument that works reliably on Platinum, Silver, Nickel, and brass samples.  

The core tasks include designing the full analog front-end (pulser/receiver, low-noise pre-amp, gain control, anti-alias filters), selecting and driving the piezo transducers, and implementing a precise time-of-flight algorithm in an embedded platform. I am open to ARM, DSP, or FPGA solutions as long as we can achieve micro-second timing resolution and keep power draw low enough for a battery-powered unit.

On the digital side I will need firmware that triggers the pulse, captures echoes through a high-speed ADC, processes the signal (envelope detection, filtering, thresholding), and converts flight time to velocity with temperature compensation. A simple menu-driven interface on a small LCD/OLED plus USB-C data output should round out the user experience.

Because the device must differentiate among Platinum, Silver, Nickel, and brass, repeatability and calibration routines are critical. I would like a calibration workflow that lets the user store reference blocks and automatically correct readings.

Deliverables  
• Schematics and PCB Gerbers for the analog and digital boards  
• BOM with production-grade components  
• Firmware source code and build instructions  
• Signal-processing algorithm documentation (MATLAB or Python reference OK)  
• 3D files for a compact enclosure, i

title: Identify Malicious Instagram Posters -- 2
desc:
I manage an Instagram group that has been hit with repeated malicious posts. My goal is to discover exactly who is behind them so I can protect the community and take the right action.  

Here is what I already have on hand:  
• Usernames involved in the attacks  
• Several matching IP addresses  
• Names and contact details tied to some of those accounts  

I have not seen any clear timing pattern—the posts appear random—so I’m hoping your investigative skills can fill in the gaps.

What I need from you:  
1. Analyse the data I provide and trace each malicious account back to the real individual operating it.  
2. Document your findings in a concise report that shows how you linked each username or IP to a confirmed identity (screenshots, lookup logs, or other verifiable evidence).  
3. Flag any privacy-policy or legal considerations I should be aware of before acting on the information.

If you have proven OSINT experience, familiarity with Instagram’s data landscape, and a methodical approach to digital forensics, I’d love to work with you.

title: E-com Sales for Physio Products -- 2
desc:
I have two complementary healthcare items—a professionally printed physiotherapy book and a matching range of IASTM tools—that I want to push hard on Amazon.  My primary goal is simple: increase sales.  Everything else (brand storytelling, future expansion to our own website or even eBay) can follow once revenue momentum is clear, but for now Amazon needs to become our growth engine.

Here’s what I need from you:

• Seller Central setup or overhaul, including the right fulfilment method (FBA vs. FBM)  
• High-converting listings for both products, with keyword-rich titles, bullet points and back-end terms  
• A+ Content/Brand Store design that visually links the book and the tools as a single rehab solution  
• Strategic PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display) with data-driven optimisation  
• Inventory and pricing guidance so we never go out of stock or leave money on the table  
• Monthly performance reporting highlighting conversions, ad spend efficiency and next steps  

Acceptance criteria  
1. Listings are live, compliant and discoverable for all relevant search terms.  
2. A+ Content and Brand Store approved by Amazon and matching our visual guidelines.  
3. First 30-day report shows actionable insights on ACOS, TACOS and organic rank improvements.  

You should already be comfortable with Amazon SEO tools, Helium 10 or Jungle Scout for research, and have a track record of boosting sales for health-related products.  If that sounds like

title: Instagram Sales Growth Strategist
desc:
I run a small handmade jewellery label and my main priority is simple: turn Instagram into a dependable sales channel. The account already has a modest following, but conversions are low. I want product-focused posts that consistently drive viewers to check out and purchase.

Here’s what I need from you: create a data-backed content strategy centred on aspirational, high-quality product photos, short-form Reels, and clear calls-to-action. Plan the posting schedule, write the captions, and keep the visual style cohesive with my current brand palette. Paid promotion is welcome; please structure ad sets inside Meta Ads Manager, segment audiences, and A/B test creatives until we see steady uplift in product sales.

Weekly insights matter. I expect a concise report every Friday covering reach, engagement, click-throughs, and—most importantly—orders attributed to Instagram. If something underperforms, present optimisation steps rather than waiting for direction.

Deliverables  
• 30-day content calendar with post mock-ups  
• Three ad campaigns (traffic, remarketing, and look-alike) built and launched  
• KPI dashboard shared in Google Sheets, updated weekly  
• End-of-month summary with next-step recommendations

Success is defined by a measurable rise in jewellery units sold via Instagram within the first month. If this sounds within your wheelhouse, let’s get started right away.

title: B2B Agency Decision-Maker Leads
desc:
I need help filling our sales pipeline with qualified decision-makers at marketing agencies in the United States, United Kingdom, Canada and Australia. My priority is to drive new sales opportunities, so every contact you surface must have real authority to approve or purchase services.

Email will be the primary outreach channel, therefore I expect verified corporate email addresses with a very low bounce rate. Typical roles that work well for us include owners, founders, CEOs, managing partners or anyone who signs off on agency spend.

Here’s what I’m looking for from you:  
• Research and identify agencies that fit our ideal client profile.  
• Find the correct decision-maker within each agency and verify their direct email address.  
• Supply a clean spreadsheet that includes agency name, website, contact name, title, email, LinkedIn URL and the data source you used for verification.  
• Meet an agreed-upon lead volume and accuracy target (I’ll spot-check for validity).  

If you already have access to tools such as Apollo, ZoomInfo, Hunter, Snov.io or similar, let me know—quality matters more than tool choice, but proven methods are important. Turnaround and scalability will influence who I select, so please describe how quickly you can deliver the first batch and what your weekly capacity looks like.

I’m ready to move fast once I see evidence of previous B2B lead generation success in English-speaking markets.

title: Acquire Private Repository Datasets
desc:
I am looking to collaborate with organizations or software development teams that maintain mature private software repositories.

Our requirement is for repositories that provide a complete software development lifecycle, including:

Rich Git commit history
Multiple contributors
Pull requests and code reviews
Bug fixes and issue tracking
Test cases and testing workflows
Incremental code changes
Engineering and operational metadata
Technical documentation

We are interested in paid collaborations and can work under an NDA if required.

If you have access to private repositories that meet these requirements, please share:

A brief overview of the repositories
Primary programming languages and technology stack
Number of contributors
Repository maturity (years of development)
Approximate commit history
Whether documentation, issues, and test cases are available

Please note that we are looking for legitimate repository owners or organizations with the rights to collaborate and share this data.

We look forward to discussing a long-term collaboration.

title: Instagram & Facebook Graphics Design
desc:
I need a talented designer to create a cohesive set of social-media visuals for both Instagram and Facebook. The job covers two main formats—Stories and regular feed posts—so the artwork should be optimised for each size and layout while still feeling like part of the same campaign.

I will supply brand colours, typography guidelines, and any copy once we start. Your role is to translate that material into scroll-stopping graphics that look native to each platform, respect current best practices, and keep file sizes light for quick loading.

Deliverables  
• Editable source files (PSD or AI) for every Story and feed image  
• Ready-to-post PNG or JPG exports in the correct resolutions  
• A quick style sheet summarising colours, fonts, and spacing used  

Please let me know how many rounds of revisions you include and share a portfolio link that highlights previous Instagram or Facebook work. Looking forward to collaborating and launching these visuals soon.

title: Outreach Specialist for Stock Market Educators, YouTuber, Trainer and Teacher
desc:
## Description

SmartifyTrade Technologies Private Limited is a DPIIT-recognised startup building an integrated stock market education and technology ecosystem in India.

We are looking for an experienced freelancer or small agency to identify, contact, and onboard 20 suitable stock market educators, YouTubers, trainers and teachers for our platform during the launch phase.

## What the work involves

1. SmartifyTrade will provide a ready list of eligible stock market educators, YouTube channels, trainers, teachers and trading communities.

2. You will contact the selected professionals through email, LinkedIn, direct messages, WhatsApp, or phone.

3. You will professionally explain the Founding Educator opportunity using the information and outreach material provided by SmartifyTrade.

4. You will guide interested stock market educators, YouTubers, trainers and teachers to complete and submit the official application on our platform.

5. You will answer basic questions using the information provided by SmartifyTrade.

6. SmartifyTrade will handle application review, approval, account setup, platform access, tools, onboarding, and ongoing support.

## What you do not need to do

1. No teaching is required.

2. No stock market or trading knowledge is required.

3. No technical setup is required.

4. No student management is required.

5. No platform support is required.

6. No long-term follow-up is required after the applicant has successfully submitted the application.

## W

title: Junior QA Tester Needed (Manual Testing)
desc:
Job Summary

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Junior QA Tester with 1–2 years of experience in Manual Testing to join our QA team. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of software testing fundamentals, be capable of executing test cases thoroughly, reporting defects effectively, and creating high-quality manual test cases. Experience in test automation and API testing will be considered an added advantage.

Key Responsibilities
Design, create, review, and maintain manual test cases based on business requirements.
Execute functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing.
Identify, document, and track defects with clear reproduction steps and supporting evidence.
Verify bug fixes and perform regression testing before releases.
Collaborate closely with developers, product owners, and other QA team members to ensure product quality.
Participate in requirement analysis and provide early feedback from a QA perspective.
Maintain accurate test execution reports and testing documentation.
Contribute to continuous improvement of QA processes and best practices.

Preferred Skills
Basic knowledge of API testing using tools such as Postman.
Exposure to test automation tools or frameworks (Playwright, Selenium, Cypress, or similar).
Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development methodologies.
Desired Attributes
Smart, enthusiastic, and eager to learn.
Proactive with a strong sense of ownership.
Team player who contributes positively to the team en

title: Paid Media Junior
desc:
¿Eres un/a Paid Media Specialist junior, autodidacta y con ganas de comerte el mundo? Si tienes los conocimientos técnicos pero te falta esa oportunidad real para demostrar lo que vales y crecer, ¡este es tu sitio!

No nos importan los títulos universitarios ni los másteres caros. Nos importa tu actitud, tus ganas de aprender y que sepas moverte en las plataformas. Si has invertido horas formándote por tu cuenta y buscas un equipo que te dé la oportunidad de aplicar lo aprendido con proyectos reales, sigue leyendo.

REQUISITO IMPRESCINDIBLE:
Residir en España (Por favor, no apliques si no cumples esta condición).

¿Qué herramientas debes dominar?:
No necesitas 5 años de experiencia, pero sí saber configurar y optimizar campañas en:

Meta Ads y TikTok Ads

Google Ads

Google Tag Manager (GTM) y Google Analytics 4 (GA4) (Esencial para trackear y medir correctamente).

¿Qué ofrecemos?
Proyectos a largo plazo: No buscamos un parche temporal, queremos una colaboración estable.

Acompañamiento 24h: No te vamos a soltar ante el peligro. Tendrás soporte continuo para resolver dudas, aprender y no sentirte solo/a ante las cuentas.

Flexibilidad horaria absoluta: Organízate como quieras. No nos importa a qué hora trabajes ni desde dónde, siempre que las cosas salgan a tiempo.

Modelo de pago: Precio fijo mensual por cuenta gestionada.

Posibilidad de escalabilidad: Empezarás con una primera cuenta. Si vemos que vas fluido/a, te adaptas bien y quieres más, tendrás la posibilidad de llev

title: iPhone Videographer Needed: Hyderabad Exhibition
desc:
I’ll be running a three-day stall at an upcoming exhibition in Hyderabad and need an experienced iPhone shooter on-site for the full duration. Throughout each day you’ll capture:

• Wide, steady shots that show the entire booth and surrounding foot-traffic  
• Close-ups that highlight individual products and packaging details  
• Quick, authentic interviews with interested visitors (ambient sound only; no post-production required)

I’m after clean, well-lit footage straight from the phone—no editing, transitions, or music. Simply organise the clips by day, upload them to a shared drive before the next morning, and we’re good.

You’ll bring your own recent-model iPhone (13 or newer preferred), gimbal or stabiliser, and enough battery packs to shoot comfortably for several hours at a stretch.

Acceptance criteria  
1. A minimum of 20 minutes of usable footage per day, covering all three shot types above.  
2. Files delivered in original resolution (4K/60 fps ideal) via Google Drive, Dropbox, or AirDrop to my MacBook each evening.  
3. All material captured must be steady, well-exposed, and free from major background noise.

If you’re local to Hyderabad, comfortable working in busy exhibition halls, and can start immediately, let’s connect and lock in the dates.

title: Portable Utility Gadget Prototype Development
desc:
I want to bring a compact, consumer-friendly utility gadget to market and need an engineer who can take it from idea to production. The core of the device is simple: when triggered it must emit a clear, audible beep, making it useful as a quick-locate or alert tool. Beyond that single function, everything should be engineered for reliability, low power draw. 

Here’s the scope as I see it:

• Electronic and industrial design: refine my concept, choose components, and build a working prototype that delivers the beeping feature consistently.  
• Connectivity & app: create a lightweight companion app for both Android and iOS (Bluetooth Low Energy is fine) so users can trigger or silence the device from their phone.  Or it can be connected through Google Home or Smartlife
• Manufacturing pathway: tap into your existing contacts to price tooling, PCB assembly, plastics, and packaging at consumer-friendly volumes, then outline distribution options. 
• NDA: I’ll send one immediately—please be ready to sign before we exchange deeper details.

Deliverables will include the functional prototype, firmware, source files for the cross-platform app, a full BOM with cost breakdown, and at least two manufacturer quotes for a small initial run.

If you have a proven track record in bringing portable gadgets to market and can manage both hardware and software sides efficiently, let’s talk timelines and milestones.

title: Delete Inaccessible Blogspot Account
desc:
I created a Blogspot/Blogger account more than fifteen years ago using an old school-issued email address that no longer exists. I have already run through Google’s standard recovery forms, but they will not let me proceed because I can’t access the original inbox and the automated questions don’t recognise the limited information I still know.

Here is what I can offer: I’m willing to search for any proof of ownership you might need—old screenshots, URLs, date-stamped posts—although I’m not certain what I can dig up yet. What I will not provide is my current Google password or direct log-in credentials; I’d prefer a workflow that keeps my account secure while you guide or represent me in conversations with Google support.

What I need from you:
• Pinpoint the exact recovery path or escalation channel inside Google for legacy Blogger accounts that no longer have an active email.
• Draft the wording or even handle the live/chat/email dialogue with Google on my behalf (I’ll step in to verify identity whenever required).
• Walk me through any ownership-verification steps—forms, notarised statements, whatever Google demands—until we receive written confirmation that the blog is deleted and no longer publicly accessible.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Google confirms in writing that the blog and its associated profile are permanently removed.
2. I receive clear documentation of every step taken so I can reference it should anything resurface.

If you have successfully handled similar le

title: Succession Certificate Plaint Draft
desc:
I’m ready to move ahead with a P & SC petition in the Bengaluru District Civil and Sessions Court to secure a Succession Certificate for shares held in Vedanta Limited. My immediate need is a properly structured plaint that complies with the Karnataka Civil Rules of Practice, references the Indian Succession Act, and is formatted for filing at the P & SC jurisdiction of the court.

All supporting papers are already on my desk—death certificate, shareholding statements, and proof of relationship—so you’ll be able to focus entirely on the legal drafting itself rather than document collection. I require a clear, filing-ready plaint (Word + PDF) is the single deliverable.

Please ensure the draft:

• Sets out the cause of action, jurisdictional facts, valuation, reliefs prayed and relevant schedule of assets  
• Includes an affidavit and verification page in the standard Bengaluru format  
• Uses accurate citations and annexure labelling so the court clerk can accept it without modification

If you’ve prepared similar succession petitions before, especially in Karnataka courts, I’d be keen to see a brief sample or reference.

title: Part-Time IT Document Translator
desc:
I regularly produce and update information-technology manuals, user guides, and short knowledge-base articles that must be available in more than one language. Every file varies in size—from a handful of sentences to full-length documents—but they all share two non-negotiables: the terminology has to stay precise, and the finished text must read as if it were originally written in the target language.  

Most of the work involves technical content, so you should feel at home with IT jargon, acronyms, and product-specific wording. While many of the requests revolve around English-to-Spanish, Spanish-to-French, or French-to-English hand-offs, I’m open to other pairings you may specialise in; just let me know your strengths when you respond.  

How we’ll work  
• I’ll drop each source file (usually Word, Markdown, or occasional PDF) into our shared folder along with any reference glossaries.  
• You return a clean, fully formatted translation plus a tracked-changes copy when formatting is critical.  
• Deadlines are agreed per file, typically a two- to three-day turnaround for short pieces and a week for larger manuals.  

Acceptance criteria  
1. Terminology aligns with the provided glossary or standard IT usage.  
2. Grammar, syntax, and tone feel natural to a native reader.  
3. Original layout, headings, and code snippets remain intact.  

If you’re comfortable juggling part-time volumes and can demonstrate accuracy on IT subjects, I’d like to build a long-term rhythm with y

title: Revise Office Layout Drawings -- 2
desc:
Our current architectural file needs a focused round of layout adjustments so it accurately reflects how the space will be used day-to-day. I will provide the existing DWG/PDF plan; your job is to open it in AutoCAD (or comparable BIM/CAD software) and update three zones:

1. Workstations – reconfigure the desk grid for better circulation and insert low partitions/dividers where marked.  
2. Conference rooms – fine-tune table positioning, door swings and seating counts to match the new furniture schedule.  
3. Common areas – realign lounge seating, copy/print alcoves and pantry counters so they read correctly on plan and on the reflected ceiling if applicable.

Deliverables  
• Updated DWG and a clean, printable PDF in 1:100 (or original) scale  
• A brief change log layer-keyed or clouded so we can see every modification at a glance  
• All dimensions, tags and room names kept consistent with the office’s existing drafting standards

Acceptance will be based on:  
• Accurate placement of every new workstation module and partition line  
• Clear dimensioning with no overlapping text or leaders  
• Layers and line-weights matching the template we supply

The drawing file is ready to send as soon as we agree on timing. Let me know your estimated turnaround in days and which CAD version you prefer so I can back-save if necessary.

title: Hindi-English Documentary Script Writer Needed
desc:
# Hiring: Hindi Documentary Script Writer (Business, Economics & Geopolitics)

We're looking for a **Documentary Script Writer** who can write engaging, research-driven YouTube scripts in **Hindi-English mixed language (Hinglish)**.

Our content is inspired by the storytelling style of channels like **Think School, Geography Now, Economics Explained, Wendover Productions, Johnny Harris, and Neo**—adapted for a Hindi-speaking audience.

### Topics You'll Write On

* Business Case Studies
* Geopolitics
* Economics & Economic History
* Global Conflicts & Hidden Business Behind Them
* Corporate Battles
* Rise & Fall of Companies
* International Trade
* World History
* Finance & Global Power

### What You'll Do

* Conduct deep research from credible sources.
* Write **10–15 minute documentary scripts** with strong storytelling.
* Simplify complex topics into engaging Hinglish narration.
* Create curiosity, suspense, and smooth transitions throughout the script.
* Maintain factual accuracy while making the content highly engaging.

### Writing Style We're Looking For

* Hindi-English mix (natural conversational Hinglish).
* Storytelling instead of textbook explanations.
* Strong hook within the first 30 seconds.
* Every 20–30 seconds should introduce a new insight, question, or reveal.
* Focus on **"Why?"** and **"How?"**, not just **"What happened?"**
* Scripts should make viewers think, *"I never knew this."*

### Ideal Candidate

* Excellent research skills.
* Strong understandi
